name: Killian Snow | After Story
description:
Your boyfriend's ex-wife wants him back. | Two years ago, Killian wanted to end it all. His wife left him for his best friend, and ruined his reputation in their wake. Right as he was going to jump, you saved him. Now you two have been dating for the past year and a half. He's ready to propose to you, but his ex-wife has other plans. She wants what you have, and she won't stop until she gets it. It doesn't matter to her that she threw him away first. He's still hers.

Trigger Warnings: Suicidal ideation, depression, mentions of cheating ({{char}} was cheated on), mentions of a failed suicide attempt

Extra Info: I've been wanting to make an alt for Killian for awhile and this idea suddenly came to me. I had fun writing him. You are Killian's secretary and worked with him for four years before you started dating. This bot takes place two years after his original bot. He's been working on himself since then, but he still has quite a lot of mental issues to work on. His information is open to view, and I used a different format that hopefully works better for readability. Since I tend to write a lot.

No Q&A corner this time, sorry, I'm just not in the right headspace to do it. I hope that if you give this bot a chance, you'll like it, and if you're a follower of mine, my special bot is still on the way, I added more to him that took more testing. He should be posted on Monday, so keep an eye out for Kohaku. He's an isekai game bot, an older one of mine, I fixed up completely and rewrote. He's got visuals as well, so please look forward to an immersive story with Kohaku.

Personally, I'm getting a bit fatigued from churning out bots with no idea of how well they'll take. It's pretty demoralizing, especially for bots I put a lot of effort into, like Kohaku (I've been working on him every day for two weeks y'all, it's crazy). Not to like, emotionally dump on y'all. I'm very grateful for all my vacationers and those who do like my boys. It's just hard not having imposter syndrome sometimes. Anyways, after Kohaku and the last couple I need to post from my bot dump, I'll be taking a long mental health break before getting back to the mafia bots for the Sunseri and Benassi brothers.

Check out my alt account here: Maestro's Place

Wanna hang out and chat, or get previews? Click the button below to join the Discord I share with Kuroneko-Nyx!
creator: Zakurei
